name: debug-mcp
description: Steers Claude Code toward the debug MCP server for interactive native debugging instead of print-debugging or one-shot CLI runs: a hook that nudges toward live breakpoints/inspection when a run or edit looks like it's chasing a crash or wrong value, plus scenario skills covering the debug tool surface (launch/attach, breakpoints, stepping, stack & variable inspection, expression evaluation, memory/disassembly, raw LLDB).
